channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Which first lady feared her husband might be having a stroke? The quiz knows
item.description: This week, the pope criticized AI, a luxury carmaker entered the EV market, and a first lady made a surprising remark.

item.title: Photos show the world's 'uncounted' people and the effort to count them
item.description: Colombian-American photographer Juan Arredondo documents people without birth or death certificates and the challenges of registration.

item.title: Russian drone targeting Ukraine crashes in Romania, injuring two
item.description: A Russian drone from an overnight attack on Ukraine crashed into an apartment building in eastern Romania, injuring two people.

item.title: U.S. cattle herd hits 75-year low, raising concerns for beef prices
item.description: The U.S. beef and dairy cattle population has fallen to its smallest since 1951 due to drought, rising costs, and consolidation.
